notableEvents.label: Colton Cowser pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colton Cowser called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: José Caballero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero grounds into a double play, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to second baseman Blaze Alexander to first baseman Pete Alonso. Jazz Chisholm Jr. out at 2nd. José Caballero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo singles on a line drive to center fielder Trent Grisham. Pete Alonso to 3rd. Samuel Basallo to 2nd. Pete Alonso advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Trent Grisham.
